compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Can Fan RVK, Phresh TEK Inline, Vortex S-Line
compatible_devices.notes: Cooling outlet switches fan on/off based on temperature setpoint; separate day/night setpoints supported. For high-amp AC units, use APCL4X/APCL8X power expander. Controller is 120V NEMA (North American); requires step-down transformer for 230V European equipment.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC Infinity CLOUDLINE T4, Systemair RVK EC, Vents 125EC
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only via cooling outlet; EC motor speed remains at fan's own controller setpoint. No 0-10V or PWM speed signal available. Fan runs at fixed preset speed when controller energizes the outlet.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Dr. Infrared DR-988, greenhouse tube heater
compatible_devices.notes: Heating outlet activates when temperature falls below setpoint. Day/night temperature setpoints independently adjustable. Max 14.5A total across all four outlets.
Humidity outlet configured for humidification mode. Cannot run humidifier and dehumidifier simultaneously on the same outlet. Outlet is shared with dehumidifier (one or the other).

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Santa Fe Compact, Dri-Eaz F203, commercial grow dehumidifier
compatible_devices.notes: Humidity outlet configured for dehumidification mode. Same outlet shared with humidifier—configure for one or the other. Outlet switches on when RH exceeds setpoint.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CAP PPM-1, Blueprint BPCO2G, Titan Controls Ares 8
compatible_devices.notes: CO2/Night outlet activates when grow lights are ON and cooling outlet is NOT running (simple interlock logic via built-in photocell). No CO2 PPM sensor; no closed-loop PPM feedback. Suitable only for non-sealed rooms. CO2 automatically disabled when exhaust fan runs.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 solenoid valve + regulator assembly, compressed CO2 tank system
compatible_devices.notes: Same CO2/Night outlet as co2_generator. Triggers solenoid valve on compressed CO2 systems when lights are on and cooling is off. No PPM feedback—interlock logic only. Dual-function outlet also serves as night device (activates during lights-off period).
